overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit traversing a foggy industrial outpost at night. The character walks through an open plaza with metal barriers and floodlights, approaches a building labeled 'NEW HOMESTEAD', and enters through a red-lit airlock door.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy industrial plaza with metal safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy open plaza toward distant floodlights

entered.detail: metal railings and barriers lining the right side of the path
tall industrial light poles illuminating the foggy area with warm orange light
large industrial buildings and structures visible through the fog in the distance
snow or ash-covered concrete ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, foggy industrial plaza at night. Metal safety barriers line the right side while tall floodlights pierce through the dense fog ahead. The ground is covered in snow or ash, and distant industrial structures are barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching industrial building entrance with graffiti

events.description: character turns left toward the New Homestead building
building facade with airlock door becomes clearly visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the building entrance while walking along the snow-covered path

notable_agents.action: standing motionless near the building wall wearing a spacesuit

entered.detail: large industrial brick building with metal trim and airlock entrance
heavy metal airlock door with small window and riveted frame
white painted text reading NEW HOMESTEAD on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward a large industrial building labeled 'NEW HOMESTEAD'. An NPC in a spacesuit stands near the wall to the right. The heavy airlock door becomes visible as the character approaches, with the previous plaza elements disappearing into the fog behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: building airlock entrance with activation panel

events.description: airlock door interface lights up with red glow
airlock door slides open revealing bright red interior lighting

agents.ego_description: standing before the airlock door waiting for it to open, then preparing to enter

notable_agents.action: remaining stationary near the wall in the background

entered.detail: bright red light emanating from inside the airlock as the door opens

segments.scene_description: The character stops directly in front of the airlock door. The door interface illuminates with red light and slides open to reveal a brightly lit red interior. The NPC remains visible in the background near the graffiti-covered wall as the character prepares to enter the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, foggy industrial plaza that culminates in the entrance of a brightly lit facility. It begins with the character traversing a wide expanse of snow or ash, moving past metal safety barriers as tall floodlights pierce through the dense nocturnal haze. As the character turns left, the open plaza fades into the fog behind them, shifting the focus toward a large industrial building labeled New Homestead and a nearby NPC in a spacesuit. The scene then closes in as the character stops before a heavy airlock door, which illuminates with a red glow and slides open to reveal a vivid red interior. Finally, the camera lingers on the transition from the cold, gray exterior to the glowing warmth of the building's entrance.
